title: Student Allowances Regulations 1998 (New Zealand)
description: New Zealand secondary legislation (SR 1998/277) administered by the Ministry of Social Development that establishes eligibility criteria, assessment mechanisms, payment schedules, and suspension rules for student allowances including basic grants, accommodation benefits, and income-based assessments.
